dataset: NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)

pi_items.source: Verified by grep search of libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz - found patients named Brandie (Osborn, Hernandez, Clark, Gibson, Green).

Verified by grep search of libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz - zero matches for 'Sammet' in 9,380 patient records. setup_task.sh incorrectly assumes the patient exists and crashes because there is no fallback creation logic.
Explicitly defined and verified in task.json and export_result.sh.
Explicitly defined and verified in task.json and export_result.sh.
Explicitly defined in setup_librehealth.sh default credentials and verified by verifier.py logic.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real NHANES public health survey data. However, a critical defect was discovered: the specified patient 'Brandie Sammet' does NOT exist in the 9,380 patient records (zero matches for surname 'Sammet'). Because setup_task.sh explicitly checks for this patient and exits with an error code if not found, the task is completely defective and will crash during setup without any fallback mechanism to create the patient.
